summary: Added project-local OpenCode custom commands for loading and saving AI-QA-LAB durable memory from the TUI.
derived_updates: Added /memory-load to read recall, user preferences, runtime handoff, current mission, next actions, learned flow, and bug patterns before continuing.
Added /memory-save to trigger post-run durable memory updates, module knowledge updates, learning-ledger append, and recall refresh.
Documented the custom commands in OPENCODE_MEMORY_GUIDE.md and READY_COMMANDS.md.
